tagline: Owner-operated fence builder in Sebastopol since 2007
seoDescription: Heritage Fence Builders — an owner-operated, licensed fencing contractor in Sebastopol, CA, serving Sonoma County since 2007. Residential fence installation with prompt service and fair, no-pressure pricing. CSLB #904463.
heroSubheading: Heritage Fence Builders is an owner-operated, licensed fencing contractor in Sebastopol — residential fence installation done on time and priced fairly, with options to suit your property rather than the up-sell.
highlights: 23 reviews praising prompt, fair, on-time work
aboutBody: Heritage Fence Builders is an owner-operated fencing company in Sebastopol, run by Jason Gonsalves and serving homeowners across Sonoma County since 2007. As a single-operator shop, Jason handles the work himself — from the first call and estimate through to a clean, finished fence.

Customers consistently note that he returns calls promptly, lays out several fencing options without pushing the most expensive one, and finishes on time at a fair price. The company is a licensed California fencing contractor, license #904463, and has earned 23 reviews from local clients.

services.title: Residential Fence Installation
services.description: New fence installation for homes across Sonoma County, with options chosen to fit your property and budget.

services.title: Fence Replacement
services.description: Replacing old, failing or storm-damaged fencing with sturdy, well-built new fence.

services.title: Gates
services.description: Matching gates installed as part of your fence for clean access and curb appeal.

services.title: Estimates & Options
services.description: Prompt callbacks and honest, no-pressure estimates laying out the choices available to you.

testimonials.quote: Returned my call right away, gave me several fencing options without pushing the priciest, and finished on time at a fair price.
testimonials.author: Verified Yelp review · Sebastopol

notes: Verified via web research. CSLB license #904463 (Fencing, C-13), owner Jason Roger Gonsalves, 5750 McFarlane Rd, Sebastopol 95472; (707) 823-8608. License confirmed via BBB profile and BuildZoom (BuildZoom score 92); $15,000 bond. NOTE: expiration date conflicts across sources (BBB profile 10/31/2027 vs cached snippet 10/31/2025) — so on-site we cite the license number and 'licensed' without asserting an expiration; treat as active but confirm before outreach. Founding 2007 per BBB ('in business 18 years, started 10/5/2007'). Website status: NONE — BBB and BuildZoom both list no website; Yelp/BBB/Nextdoor/directory listings only. Trust signal = active CSLB license #904463 + 23 Yelp reviews (May 2026). Could NOT extract the exact Yelp star number (yelp.com 403s), so no star figure is stated — only the review count. Hours not verified → []. Photo-less build. Testimonial paraphrased honestly from aggregated review snippets (responsiveness, multiple options, on-time, fair price) — verify exact wording before quoting verbatim in outreach.
